message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "havenarbeider" as havenarbeider
actor "douane en voedselinspectie" as douane
actor "scheepsagent" as scheepsagent
participant "Api gateway" as api_gateway
participant "kapiteinsdienst" as kapiteinsdienst
participant "administratie" as administratie
participant "containerbeheer en -transport" as containerbeheer

rectangle "per schip" {
  scheepsagent -> api_gateway: registerVessel
  api_gateway -> kapiteinsdienst: registerVessel
  kapiteinsdienst -> administratie: requestOffer
  administratie -> kapiteinsdienst: offerCreated
  administratie -> containerbeheer: newContainerList

  opt [deleteOffer] {
    scheepsagent -> api_gateway: offerConfirmation(isConfirmed == false)
    api_gateway -> kapiteinsdienst: offerConfirmation(isConfirmed == false)
    kapiteinsdienst -> administratie: deleteOffer
  }

  douane -> api_gateway: getDocuments
  api_gateway -> administratie: getDocuments
  administratie --> api_gateway: 
  api_gateway --> douane: 
}

rectangle "per havenarbeider" {
  havenarbeider -> api_gateway: timeBadging
  api_gateway -> administratie: timeBadging
  havenarbeider -> api_gateway: getPayCheck
  api_gateway -> administratie: getPayCheck
  administratie --> api_gateway: 
  api_gateway --> havenarbeider: 
}

@enduml
